meanings.definition: large or big relative to something else
above average in size or number or quantity or magnitude or extent
examples: set out for the big city

meanings.definition: fairly large or important in effect; influential
examples: played a large role in the negotiations
a man given to large talk
a heart big enough to hold no grudges
that's very big of you to be so forgiving
a big figure in the movement
he's very large in financial circles

meanings.definition: having broad power and range and scope
in an advanced stage of pregnancy
